title: LiDAR SLAM: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping
author: Laser Quinn
Autonomous Systems Engineer
description: Build real-time 3D maps with LiDAR—but perceptual aliasing causes loop closure failures
content:
SLAM algorithms enable robots to build maps while localizing themselves simultaneously.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Navigation Failure Cascade (2036)](/docs/articles/navigation-failure-2036)
